evals.prompt: Implement a BLE scanner that logs the device name of any peripheral advertising a service with UUID '0000180d-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb'.
evals.expected_output: A script using BleModule to scan for heart rate monitors.
expectations: Inside callback, logs device.name or device.id
Handles user permission or device-not-found cases

evals.prompt: Write a script that connects to a BLE device and subscribes to notifications from a heart rate characteristic.
evals.expected_output: A script managing BLE connection and characteristic subscription.
expectations: Uses service.getCharacteristic(uuid) to find the target
Parses the incoming DataView buffer (e.g., value.getUint8(1))
